title: wedelia bahiensis
intro: Wedelia bahiensis, also known as Bahamian daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia bahiensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of Wedelia bahiensis can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a range of uses in natural remedies and traditional medicine.
